title: v3.4.0 release!!
message: Loads of bug fixes, performance improvements, and new features!
changes: Added "Bridge": a brand new system that handles all the games, improving the proxy speed, and fixed other assets, such as bookmark and tab favicons being blocked! A lot more efficient and reliable than what we had before.
Added this very cool little notifications menu.
Added 3 new search engines: Brave, Mojeek, and Swisscows.
Added 2 new decoy options: Wikipedia and Canva.

Added a game source selector in the settings menu: GN-Math, Selenite, and Truffled. More sources will be added very soon! Different sources offer different games. So if you can't find a game you want, try switching sources!
Added the ability to close any modals, menus, and prompts by pressing ESC.
Improved the site loading speed.
Improved the Wisp server overall performance and stability.
Improved Scramjet and Ultraviolet speed.
Improved the UI and its animations.
Reduced the build size.
Reduced bandwidth usage.
Fixed various minor bugs.
Fixed the title not updating to the set decoy title.
Fixed favicon being blocked on bookmarks and tabs.
Fixed some of the UI elements being misaligned.
Fixed detection issues.
endMessage: Thank you everyone so much for all the recent support! Enjoy the new update! :D

title: HAPPY THANKSGIVING!!!!
message: Just wanted to say how thankful I am for every single one of you guys for supporting Waves and helping it get this far! If you ever told me that Waves was ever gonna get this far 10 months ago, I would've never believed it. So seriously, thank you!
changes: Enjoy your holiday but if it's not Thanksgiving for you yet, happy early Thanksgiving! 🦃
endMessage: Also join the Discord server for more links!

title: v3.4.1 release!!
message: Bunch of bug fixes, some improvements, and new stuff!
changes: Improved Bridge performance, added support for more stuff, and added protection to ensure it never accidentally corrupt any game binary files.
Added 2 new game sources: Velara and DuckMath.
Changed some of the UI animation speed.
Fixed WebRTC leaking your actual IP address.
Fixed the font loading very slow.
Fixed the page hanging on load.
Fixed the iframe flashing you like crazy.
Fixed game lists not going through Bridge.
Fixed some stuff in the setup file.
endMessage: If you want more game sources added, join the Discord server and request them!

title: Skeleton loading
changes: Game covers, bookmark favicons, and tab favicons now use skeleton loading.
endMessage: Join the Discord server for more links!

title: v3.4.2 release!!
message: Loads of more bug fixes, improvements, new features, and now the whole site is also jolly!
changes: Added a brand new game page!
Added a bunch of jolly things!
Improved the site performance and stability.
Improved games loading speed.
Fixed memory leaks.
Fixed some games not loading.
Fixed the proxy barely working.
Fixed Bridge crashing on heavy load.
Overall just fixed a bunch of minor bugs and improved the site by a little bit.
endMessage: If you have any issues or suggestions, please do join the Discord server and let me know!

title: v3.4.5 release!!
message: Bunch of bug fixes, new stuff, and improvements!
changes: Added tabs memory usage to the sidebar of the browser.
Added the ability to open new tab links directly in the browser itself to prevent leaking the url when cloaking.
Added a new background effect.
Improved site overall performance significantly.
Removed duckmath from game source.
Removed the grid background.
Fixed tab title, favicon, and url being inaccurate. They should now always be 100% accurate!
Fixed games loading very slow and barely working.
Fixed Eruda being blocked.
endMessage: There's more stuff but I forgot some of them. Join the Discord server for more links!

title: v3.5.0 release!!
message: A LOTTTT of improvements and bug fixes!
changes: Rewrote Bridge to Rust.
Improved the whole site in general speed.
Renamed Bridge to Mochi.
Fixed some bugs.
endMessage: There was some more stuff but I forgot about them. Also join the Discord server!

title: Patch v3.5.1!!
changes: Fixed where page would take forever to load.
Fixed Scramjet and Ultraviolet being INSANELY broken.
endMessage: If you get any bugs please join the Discord server and reprot them!

title: Mochi v0.2.0 release!!
message: Improved performance and patched some bugs!
changes: Improved performance and caching.
Fixed a big bottleneck that was making it very slow.
Fixed some other bugs.

title: Patch v3.5.2!!
changes: Changed from Coursea to Collegeboard for the page.
Fixed site loading very slow.
Optimized overall performance.
And some other stuff that i forgot about.
endMessage: The site should be a lot faster. Join the Discord server for more links!!

title: Mochi patch v0.2.1!!
message: Fixed more bugs and some optimizations.
changes: Bunch of optimizations.
Fixed some more bottleneck issues.

title: Patch v3.5.6!!
message: New features, bug fixes, optimizations, and a lot of improvements.
changes: Added a brand new cloud syncing system.
Fixed site slow speed.
Fixed the favicon not changing to the selected cloak.
Fixed toast notifications not working.
Removed selenite as a game source.
Very big performance improvements.
There was a lot more stuff but im too lazy to list them all out!
endMessage: Everything should be fixed and the site should feel a lot faster. Join the Discord server for more links!!

title: Mochi patch v0.2.4!!
message: Fixed a ton load of bugs and optimizations.
changes: The message above should be self explanatory.

title: Patch v3.5.8!!
message: Loads and loads of bug fixes and improvements!
changes: Make site speed faster by 10x.
Fixed some small bugs.
Improved CloudSync security.
Added a new game source: Squall.
Added a new loading screen.
endMessage: I'm getting way too lazy to write these notifications. Join the Discord server for more links!!

title: Even more bug fixes

Fixed some stability issues.
